  This  package  provides  categorization of code points as defined by
  UnicodeData file.

simple_types.name: General_Category
simple_types.code:
type General_Category is
     (  Lu,
        Ll,
        Lt,
        Lm,
        Lo,
        Mn,
        Mc,
        Me,
,
,
,
,
,
        …,
        Cn
     );

subtypes.name: Letter
subtypes.code: subtype Letter      is General_Category range Lu..Lo;

documentation.description:
Category -- Get category of a code point

   Value - Code point

Returns :

   The category of value

subtypes.name: Mark
subtypes.code: subtype Mark        is General_Category range Mn..Me;

documentation.description:
Category -- Get category of a code point

   Value - Code point

Returns :

   The category of value

subtypes.name: Mumber
subtypes.code: subtype Mumber      is General_Category range Nd..No;

documentation.description:
Category -- Get category of a code point

   Value - Code point

Returns :

   The category of value

subtypes.name: Other
subtypes.code: subtype Other       is General_Category range Cc..Cn;

documentation.description:
Category -- Get category of a code point

   Value - Code point

Returns :

   The category of value

subtypes.name: Punctuation
subtypes.code: subtype Punctuation is General_Category range Pc..Po;

documentation.description:
Category -- Get category of a code point

   Value - Code point

Returns :

   The category of value

subtypes.name: Separator
subtypes.code: subtype Separator   is General_Category range Zs..Zp;

documentation.description:
Category -- Get category of a code point

   Value - Code point

Returns :

   The category of value

subtypes.name: Symbol
subtypes.code: subtype Symbol      is General_Category range Sm..So;

documentation.description:
Category -- Get category of a code point

   Value - Code point

Returns :

   The category of value
